arts.sum: Hansi Flick: 'We'll play the best possible team' - FC Barcelona "He is underrated and is one of the players who has the most influence on the offensive and defensive game, on team and individual work; I would prefer that neither he nor Lamine played," said the Osasuna coach before visiting Barça.

arts.ttl: Class: FC Barcelona 2025 Polo Shirt Released
arts.sum: Last week, Barcelona launched a special retro 2025 polo jersey with a subtle and classic design.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Osasuna: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Barcelona vs Osasuna in La Liga, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: ‘One of the best’ - Osasuna boss goes crazy for Raphinha
arts.sum: Osasuna boss Vicente Moreno has been full of praise for Raphinha ahead of Saturday’s clash with Barcelona at Monjuic . Osasuna beat Barcelona 4-2 earlier in the season in a match which both Raphinha and Lamine Yamal started no the bench.

arts.ttl: Former RFEF chief ‘threat to kill’ Lamine Yamal’s father over Spain allegiance
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has risen to become a star for Barcelona and Spain in the last 12 months. The 17-year-old was selected in Luis de la Fuente’s squad for UEFA Euro 2024 last summer, and despite not turning 17 until the day before their final win over England, he was central to the title. He is […] The post Former RFEF chief ‘threat to kill’ Lamine Yamal’s father over Spain allegiance appeared first on Football España.

arts.sum: A key member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona is expected to drop to the bench for the club’s next outing. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: What to look out for as Barca take on Osasuna in La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona head into the match still unbeaten in 2025 but will be eyeing revenge on Osasuna who handed Flick’s side a first defeat of the season back in September with a shock 4-2 win. Osasuna striker Ante Budimir scored twice in the 4-2 win and numbers Barcelona as one of his favourite victims in La Liga along with Girona, Cadiz, and Granada.
